title: Record soft10 async1 and tool500 densify

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft10 Async1 Tool500 Contract

## Soft 10
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.10 with quality bias floor 0.08 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Async 1
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.01 so reclaim starts earlier

## Tool 500
tool result budgets default to 500 chars with 8-char previews; Grep head defaults to 30 for denser reclaim

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/grep/status/usage/footer vitest
